metadata.title: Smart Positioning Leads to a Smooth Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how clever positioning and quick reactions secure this double kill.
Timing each peek perfectly made all the difference in the round.
What’s your favorite angle to hold when clutching?
